title: Chief Cognitive Systems Officer
summary: The cognitive systems leader responsible for conceptual architecture, terminology, epistemic coherence, and the structure of ICOS thinking.
biography: This executive seat is available. Neuroartan has defined the Chief Cognitive Systems Officer role as a real operating standard before appointing a public holder.
The cognitive systems leader responsible for conceptual architecture, terminology, epistemic coherence, and the structure of ICOS thinking.
The public profile is intentionally role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Keep Neuroartan’s cognitive frameworks coherent, usable, and protected from vague metaphor or inflated system claims.
source_posture: Governed role placeholder for future executive hiring
